fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the service document associated with this line.

fields.name: Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer who owns the items to be serviced under the service order.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the service order number associated with this line.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the line.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the service line.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of an item, general ledger account, resource code, cost, or standard text.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the inventory location from where the items on the line should be taken and where they should be registered.

fields.name: Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the inventory posting group assigned to the item.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of an item, resource, cost, or a standard text on the line.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional description of the item, resource, or cost.

fields.name: Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the item or resource's unit of measure, such as piece or hour.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of item units, resource hours, cost on the service line.

fields.name: Qty. to Invoice
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the items, resources, costs, or general ledger account payments, which should be invoiced.

fields.name: Qty. to Ship
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of items that remain to be shipped.

fields.name: Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price of one unit of the item or resource. You can enter a price manually or have it entered according to the Price/Profit Calculation field on the related card.

fields.name: Unit Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost, in LCY, of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: VAT %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT percentage used to calculate Amount Including VAT on this line.

fields.name: Line Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the discount defined for a particular group, item, or combination of the two.

fields.name: Line Discount Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the discount amount that is granted for the item on the line.

fields.name: Amount Including VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net amount, including VAT, for this line.

fields.name: Allow Invoice Disc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the invoice line is included when the invoice discount is calculated.

fields.name: Appl.-to Item Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry that the document or journal line is applied to.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Job No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related job.

fields.name: Job Task No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related job task.

fields.name: Job Line Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of journal line that is created in the Job Planning Line table from this line.

fields.name: Work Type Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the type of work performed by the resource registered on this line.

fields.name: Quantity Shipped
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item on the line have been posted as shipped.

fields.name: Quantity Invoiced
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item on the line have been posted as invoiced.

fields.name: Shipment No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the correspondent shipment in the posted shipment list.

fields.name: Bill-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer that you send or sent the invoice or credit memo to.

fields.name: Inv. Discount Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total calculated invoice discount amount for the line.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's or customer's trade type to link transactions made for this business partner with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's product type to link transactions made for this item with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Tax Area Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the tax area that is used to calculate and post sales tax.

fields.name: Tax Liable
fields.tooltip: Specifies that items, resources, or costs on the current credit memo line are liable for sales tax.

fields.name: Tax Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sales tax group code to which this item belongs.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT specification of the involved customer or vendor to link transactions made for this record with the appropriate general ledger account according to the VAT posting setup.

fields.name: VAT Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT specification of the involved item or resource to link transactions made for this record with the appropriate general ledger account according to the VAT posting setup.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code for the amounts on this line.

fields.name: Reserved Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many item units on this line have been reserved.

fields.name: Reserve
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether a reservation can be made for items on this line.

fields.name: VAT Base Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that serves as a base for calculating the Amount Including VAT field.

fields.name: Line Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of products on the worksheet line.

fields.name: Job Planning Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the project planning line number associated with this line. This establishes a link that can be used to calculate actual usage.

fields.name: Job Remaining Qty.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that remains to complete a project.

fields.name: Job Remaining Total Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the remaining total cost, as the sum of costs from project planning lines associated with the order.

fields.name: Job Remaining Total Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the remaining total cost for the project planning line associated with the service order.

fields.name: Job Remaining Line Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net amount of the project planning line.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin where the items are picked or put away.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Quantity (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of items, resource time, costs, or general ledger account payments, expressed in base units of measure.

fields.name: Outstanding Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of registered items, resource time, costs, or payments to the general ledger account that have not been shipped.

fields.name: Reserved Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of registered items that have been reserved.

fields.name: Substitution Available
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether a substitute is available for the item.

fields.name: Nonstock
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the item is a catalog item.

fields.name: Item Reference No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the referenced item number. If you enter a cross reference between yours and your vendor's or customer's item number, then this number will override the standard item number when you enter the reference number on a service document.

fields.name: Planned Delivery Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the planned date that the shipment will be delivered at the customer's address. If the customer requests a delivery date, the program calculates whether the items will be available for delivery on this date. If the items are available, the planned delivery date will be the same as the requested delivery date. If not, the program calculates the date that the items are available for delivery and enters this date in the Planned Delivery Date field.

fields.name: Appl.-from Item Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry that the document or journal line is applied from.

fields.name: Service Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the service item number linked to this service line.

fields.name: Appl.-to Service Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies the service ledger entry number this line is applied to.

fields.name: Service Item Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the service item line number linked to this service line.

fields.name: Service Item Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the serial number of the service item to which this service line is linked.

fields.name: Service Item Line Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the service item line in the service order.

fields.name: Serv. Price Adjmt. Gr. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the service price adjustment group code that applies to this line.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the service line should be posted.

fields.name: Needed by Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when you require the item to be available for a service order.

fields.name: Ship-to Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for an alternate shipment address if you want to ship to another address than the one that has been entered automatically. This field is also used in case of drop shipment.

fields.name: Qty. to Consume
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of items, resource hours, costs, or G/L account payments that should be consumed.

fields.name: Quantity Consumed
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of items, resource hours, costs, or general ledger account payments on this line, which have been posted as consumed.

fields.name: Fault Area Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the fault area associated with this line.

fields.name: Symptom Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the symptom associated with this line.

fields.name: Fault Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the fault associated with this line.

fields.name: Resolution Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the resolution associated with this line.

fields.name: Exclude Warranty
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the warranty discount is excluded on this line.

fields.name: Warranty
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a warranty discount is available on this line of type Item or Resource.

fields.name: Contract No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contract, if the service order originated from a service contract.

fields.name: Contract Disc. %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contract discount percentage that is valid for the items, resources, and costs on this line.

fields.name: Warranty Disc. %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of the warranty discount that is valid for the items or resources on this line.

fields.name: Spare Part Action
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the item was used to replace the whole service item, one of the service item components, installed as a new component, or used as a supplementary tool.

fields.name: Fault Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the fault reason for this service line.

fields.name: Exclude Contract Discount
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the contract discount is excluded for the item, resource, or cost on this line.

fields.name: Line Discount Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the line discount assigned to this line.

fields.name: Return Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code explaining why the item was returned.
